params.name: Voynich Manuscript
params.description:
On Oct 17, 1912 AD, a strange medieval book was discovered in Rome. The Voynich Manuscript.
Written in the 15th century, this book is filled with strange words and punctuation. There are pictures of animals and plants, stars, and even bathing beauties on every page. Many cryptographers tried to crack it, including Adri, who cracked the German code, and the American navy, who cracked the Japanese navy code, but to no avail.
